message:
fix(amp): improve cache root discovery with existence checks and fallback chain

The Amp connector's cache_root() could return non-existent paths or
be misled by dotenvy reading .env files instead of the real shell
environment. Reworked to:

- Use std::env::var instead of dotenvy::var for XDG_DATA_HOME to read
  the actual shell environment rather than .env files
- Added existence checks at each discovery step — only returns a path
  if the directory actually exists
- Added explicit XDG default path (~/.local/share/amp) as a middle
  step before platform-specific fallback
- Changed return type to Option<PathBuf> so callers handle the
  "no Amp data found" case explicitly instead of getting a bogus path
- candidate_roots() updated to conditionally include cache root only
  when it resolves to an actual directory

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
